headline: Assessing Willis Towers Watson (WTW) Valuation After New Specialty Insurance Facilities And Partnerships
summary: What the WELL launch and new facilities mean for WTW shareholders Willis Towers Watson (WTW) has been busy, launching its Willis Excess Liability Lineslip facility in the US, while also rolling out new specialty insurance and pricing solutions across art and digital MGA markets. For you as an investor, these product moves and partnerships highlight where WTW is choosing to compete within insurance broking and risk solutions, and how its capabilities are being applied to niche areas that have...

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Willis Towers Watson, Lowers Price Target to $320
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Vincent Sinisi   maintains Willis Towers Watson (NASDAQ:WTW) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $330 to $320.
